name: Dr. Linh Tran
affiliation: Faculty of Computer Science and Intelligent Systems
bio: Leads the lab's agenda on trustworthy AI infrastructure, adaptive networking, and translational research partnerships with public-sector and industry collaborators.

name: Minh Nguyen
bio: Works on scalable model serving, network-aware orchestration, and systems evaluation for large-model deployment.

name: Sara Pham
bio: Studies robust learning under unreliable connectivity, partial observability, and distribution shift in the edge setting.

name: Anh Le
bio: Builds evaluation pipelines for edge intelligence and spectrum-aware learning.

name: Nora Ho
bio: Focuses on efficient multimodal models for constrained devices and lightweight evaluation pipelines for deployment studies.

name: Bao Vu
bio: Maintains reproducible experiment stacks, benchmarking workflows, and open-source infrastructure used across multiple lab projects.

name: Quoc Bui
bio: Contributed to the lab's first open benchmarking stack for adaptive edge inference.
